The '''XR-10 Shadowhawk''' was a model of [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] that was employed by the [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]. Manufactured by [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]], the bike could achieve 750 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour and had a flight ceiling of fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]].

{{Veh-stub}}
